headline: SmokyValleyWheatWarriors: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: SmokyValleyWheatWarriors is projected #4 of 16 with a 662.40 projected-starting-lineup C-AVI total, led by CeeDee Lamb, Christian McCaffrey, and James Cook. The immediate priority is improving the FLEX slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Sum of the eight verified projected starters' C-AVI values from all 16 AVI-Core team files

dynasty_power.method: Sum of every verified rostered player's D-AVI value from all 16 AVI-Core team files

latest_trade.summary: On October 28, SmokyValleyWheatWarriors traded with Hit & Ruggs 🏎️ and acquired 2026 Round 3 (Conquistadors), 2027 Round 2 (Conquistadors) while sending Kayshon Boutte. The deal added 2 draft assets.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the FLEX slot above Rico Dowdle's 63.3 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 71.9 C-AVI would directly attack the 8.60-point projected gap to Mile High Royal Lions.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On July 8, Corgi Loaf Baking Co. traded with Rapid Valley Annihilation and acquired 2026 Round 1 (Rapid Valley Annihilation) while sending 2027 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.), 2028 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.). The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

rival_below.summary: On July 8, Corgi Loaf Baking Co. traded with Rapid Valley Annihilation and acquired 2026 Round 1 (Rapid Valley Annihilation) while sending 2027 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.), 2028 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.). The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #4 of 16 at 662.40 lineup C-AVI. Mile High Royal Lions is immediately above at 671.00, a gap of 8.60. Corgi Loaf Baking Co. is immediately behind at 646.90.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are CeeDee Lamb (97.8), Christian McCaffrey (97.2), and James Cook (94.3).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On October 28, SmokyValleyWheatWarriors traded with Hit & Ruggs 🏎️ and acquired 2026 Round 3 (Conquistadors), 2027 Round 2 (Conquistadors) while sending Kayshon Boutte. The deal added 2 draft assets.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the FLEX slot above Rico Dowdle's 63.3 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 71.9 C-AVI would directly attack the 8.60-point projected gap to Mile High Royal Lions. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.
